authority: This file is the single source of truth for numbers (GR-1). No metric appears in prose except as a citation of this file. Keystone-only writes.

objective.gate: tools/lexon_check.mjs full pass on every proposed LEXICON entry, plus 5 held-out census terms expressed by the assayer using only the proposal's pattern recipe, plus 3 covered regression entries; gateResult 8/8 (T5: zero collapses). Regime: spec-checker (real Lexon compiler is macOS-only, source unpublished; see SOURCES.md lexon-compiler-status).
objective.hardConstraint: every entry cites a SOURCES.md slug (GR-9 trace-or-delete); register discipline proven/conjectured/speculative never upgraded; no em dashes in artifact/; no C-series numbers or confidence percentages from any seat (GR-3)

baseline.how: node tools/census.mjs --freeze (rule pinned in artifact/CENSUS.json and tools/census.mjs EXCLUSIONS); coverage-debt re-derived by node tools/coverage.mjs against artifact/LEXICON.lexon.md

best.evidence: run lexr4 2026-07-12 (wf_53393fc4-e87, 57 agents, status INCOMPLETE: rounds 1-4 complete, round 5 lost to session-limit outage at the Gap seats, nothing folded from it): 11 levers VALIDATED 8/8 all critic-classed structural, 1 MIRAGE killed structurally (K-2 tier-invitation-spell-family: recipe honestly non-general on zero-party terms, its own cast-list rule citing the lexr3 T-105 refusal as precedent, claim diversity 2/4; plus an em dash with narrower-than-claimed self-certification, CR-10 second catch). Claim-type diversity rule held on every validated lever (3-4 of 4 types per held-out set). Keystone fold 2026-07-12: 31 unique proposal entries (heavy cross-lever/cross-round collisions: the MyTerms cluster proposed by six levers; one-expression-per-censusId, first-validated preference) + 28 deduped assayer-authored held-out entries (T-168 refused thin, T-146 refused recipe-pre-answered; T-093 and T-185 dual expressions arbitrated; T-192 folded after role inspection: Registrar/Candidate are term-native, the lexr3 refusal does not transfer), all 59 re-verified GATE PASS + RELATION PASS at fold. node tools/coverage.mjs = 64, 147 covered, 0 failed. Prior best 123 by lexr3 fold (chronicles/2026-07-11_lexr3_fold.md). Verdicts in runs/lexr4/lexr4.*/ and the engine record.

openTarget.statement: one charter, disjoint rounds, the hard residue (lexr5): the lexr4 critics proved the three lenses converged on ONE identical claim-derivation charter validated eleven times (round-level redundancy flag), so (a) merge it into a single canonical charter adopting the sovereignty-cluster universal cast rule (a section naming no actor takes the First Person as holder: sanctioned, prover-passed, distinct from invented roles), (b) BIND round-level disjointness: no two levers in a round may claim overlapping censusIds (the lexr4.2 critic's rule; per-lever metrics are otherwise non-additive), and (c) aim at what the charter has NO key for: the 64-term residue including the OT-2 quantitative ids (numeric literals are out of subset: grammar-forward checker-extension territory, keystone-coupled) and the zero-party terms that killed K-2 (now keyed by the universal cast rule: K-2's re-open condition). Candidate food: round lexr4.5's never-gate-tested proposals. OT-6 (claim-type diversity) MET by lexr4: the rule held on all 11 validated levers and contributed to the K-2 kill; coverage-debt 123 to 64.
